verdict: Conditional pass — page structurally and tonally strong; ship-ready for Apex after C1 (home register surfaces 1,300-case AJIO×JCP evidence not on /ratl), H2 (catalog row contradicts /ratl deployment framing), and H3 (engine pills granularity inconsistent with hero) are addressed. M1, M2 are quick polish. L1, L2 are cosmetic.

source_traceability.note: Every body stat traceable to ratl_jio_showcase.md lines 22-125. Two citation gaps: M1 §05 Jiomart-OS-evolution beat, M2 hero 'structurally impossible' editorial.

tone_of_voice.note: Banned vocabulary clean. One 'today' usage at line 177 (H1). One editorial 'structurally impossible' at line 80 (M2). One slightly anthropomorphised hero phrasing (L1).

honesty_register.note: Engine cards pilled 'Live · Platform' while hero says 'Live across Jio + RBL + Retail'. Source supports the stronger RR-deployed framing on all engines. Pill convention should match throughout (H3).

structural_compliance.note: §01→§07 contiguous. Chrome (nav, crumb, footer) all present. Version pill v0.9.4 matches commit. Footer follows convention (no owner/version line).

visual_completeness.note: All 4 screenshots 200 locally and via CDN (gs://impetus-socialpilot/rrl-portfolio/assets/ratl/ → socialassets.impetusz0.de). Mobile reflow clean at 390px. Console clean apart from standard Tailwind CDN dev warning.

cross_page_consistency.note: C1: home page card index.html:769 cites '1,300 test cases on AJIO×JCP · vibe-coded prototypes in JCP' for Boltic+Ratl, but /ratl does not surface this evidence anywhere. H2: catalog/index.html:253,364 frames Ratl as 'Live · internal QA + cross-product · Internal AI' contradicting /ratl's Jio + RBL + Retail production framing.

findings.issue: Home register (index.html:769) cites '1,300 test cases on AJIO×JCP · vibe-coded prototypes in JCP' as Boltic+Ratl evidence. Boltic v3 audit X1 flagged this as belonging on /ratl. /ratl does not mention 1,300 / AJIO×JCP / vibe-coded anywhere. Reviewer landing from home card finds no matching evidence.
findings.fix: Add a Live · RR · AJIO × JCP evidence block in §02 (as 8th engine card) or §06 (as a scorecard row) citing the 1,300-test-case estate. If the source for that number is outside ratl-notes-compilation/, the spec's source inventory needs to be updated.

findings.issue: Banned word 'today' per tone-of-voice §2 stance. Line: 'Every layer is live today.'
findings.fix: Drop 'today' — 'Every layer is live.' or date-bind: 'Every layer is live as of 2026-05-01.'

findings.issue: catalog/index.html:253 and :364 frame Ratl as 'Live · internal QA + cross-product' with 'Internal AI' DRI. /ratl claims 'Live across Jio + RBL + Retail' (production deployment). Source supports the production framing — catalog rows are stale.
findings.fix: Update both catalog rows to 'Live · Jio + RBL + Retail · QA + release intelligence' and align DRI label with /ratl owner.

findings.issue: All seven engine cards pilled 'Live · Platform'. Hero (line 77) and §06 outcomes scorecard claim deployments across Jio + RBL + Retail. 'Live · Platform' is the boltic convention for 'platform exists; RR deployment separate' — for Ratl, source supports the stronger RR-deployed framing throughout.
findings.fix: Change all 7 engine pills from 'Live · Platform' to 'Live · Jio + RBL + Retail' (or 'Live · RR'). Mechanical sed.

findings.issue: Catalog Intelligence forward beat ('evolving into the core intelligence layer for Jiomart OS · Building') has no inline source citation. The single Building pill on the page deserves a tight source line per tone-of-voice §5.
findings.fix: Add 'Source · Ratl × Jio showcase, lines 164-172' below the forward-beat paragraph.

findings.issue: 'made manual QA structurally impossible' is editorial. Source says 'Traditional QA models couldn't keep up' — milder.
findings.fix: Soften to 'made manual QA models impractical' or 'outpaced manual QA models'.

findings.issue: 'feed every release a confidence score before it ships' is slightly anthropomorphised.
findings.fix: Optional polish — 'emit a confidence score for every release before it ships'.

findings.issue: Screenshot card on the left scales taller than the two stacked text cards combined on wide viewports — cosmetic white-space.
findings.fix: Optional — wrap right column in flex-col with flex-1 so cards expand to match image height.

strengths: Section-label contiguity perfect §01 → §07; no gaps, no renumber tax.
Banned vocabulary clean — no transformative / world-class / cutting-edge / empowers / leverages / harnesses / unlocks / step-change / trust layer. Single 'today' is the only tone hit.
Footer follows current register convention — single copyright line, no Owner / version line.
Mobile reflow clean at 390px — all 8 sections stack legibly, no overflow.
CDN mirror in place — gs://impetus-socialpilot/rrl-portfolio/assets/ratl/ → socialassets.impetusz0.de · all 4 assets 200; page paths kept local per granary/impetus belt-and-suspenders convention.
Mega-menu mono-suffix update ('agentic quality') is more precise than the prior 'agentic auto' — sibling pages untouched.
